title: Mobile user - Guest, log in, log out - app data changes correctly
scenario: Verify mobile app data fields (Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected) correctly reflect None/Unknown in Guest and logged-out states, and display accurate tenant data when logged into a Lens tenant.
steps: Launch the mobile app and ensure you are in Guest state (not logged in).
Check the displayed values for Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected.
Verify that all four fields show None or Unknown.
Log in to a Lens tenant with valid credentials.
Check the displayed values for Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected.
Verify that Tenant name and Tenant ID match the logged-in Lens tenant.
Verify that User ID matches the authenticated user.
Verify that Last Connected shows the correct connection timestamp.
Check the displayed values for Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected.
Verify that all four fields return to None or Unknown.
expected: In Guest or logged-out state, Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected should all be None or Unknown. When logged into a Lens tenant, these fields should display the correct tenant data and connection timestamp.
